Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Court Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Matias F. Drago.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.
James MacLeod, Esq. appeared for plaintiff First National Bank of Omaha, a National Banking Association.
Joseph Guenther, Recovery Representative for First National Bank of Omaha, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. MacLeod and Guenther appeared via ZOOM Video Conference for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Matias F. Drago.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on August 11, 2017.
Substitute Service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Matias F. Drago occurred on December 30, 2019, and was effectuated on January 11, 2020.
Default as to defendant Matias F. Drago was entered on February 13, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed without prejudice on July 8, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff First National Bank of Omaha, a National Banking Association, and against defendant Matias F. Drago, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $33,143.62 (Amount pled in complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - WAIVED.
Attorney Fees - WAIVED.
Costs - $1,375.85.

Total - $34,519.47.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
